parameters.query:
SELECT
    LOWER(
        REGEXP_REPLACE(
            REGEXP_REPLACE(
                profile_url,
                '^https?://(www\.)?',
                ''
            ),
            '/$',
            ''
        )
    ) AS normalized_url,
    COUNT(*) AS duplicate_count
FROM crm_records
WHERE status = 'new'
GROUP BY
    LOWER(
        REGEXP_REPLACE(
            REGEXP_REPLACE(
                profile_url,
                '^https?://(www\.)?',
                ''
            ),
            '/$',
            ''
        )
    )
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY duplicate_count DESC;

-- Option 2: See full details of duplicate records
WITH normalized AS (
    SELECT
        id,
        record_id,
        full_name,
        email,
        phone,
        owner,
        status,
        profile_url,
        -- Normalize URL
        LOWER(
            REGEXP_REPLACE(
                REGEXP_REPLACE(
                    profile_url,
                    '^https?://(www\.)?', ''
                ),
                '/$', ''
            )
        ) AS normalized_url,
        created_at
    FROM crm_records
    WHERE status = 'new'
),
duplicates AS (
    SELECT normalized_url
    FROM normalized
    GROUP BY normalized_url
    HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
)
SELECT
    n.record_id,
    n.full_name,
    n.email,
    n.owner,
    n.profile_url,
    n.normalized_url,
    n.status,
    n.created_at,
    -- Flag which is the original (oldest)
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
        PARTITION BY n.normalized_url
        ORDER BY n.created_at ASC
    ) AS occurrence_order
FROM normalized n
INNER JOIN duplicates d
    ON n.normalized_url = d.normalized_url
ORDER BY n.normalized_url, n.created_at;

-- Option 3: Flag duplicates as Merger_Pending
-- Updates status of duplicate records (occurrence_order > 1)
WITH normalized AS (
    SELECT
        id,
        record_id,
        full_name,
        owner,
        profile_url,
        LOWER(
            REGEXP_REPLACE(
                REGEXP_REPLACE(
                    profile_url,
                    '^https?://(www\.)?', ''
                ),
                '/$', ''
            )
        ) AS normalized_url,
        created_at
    FROM crm_records
    WHERE status = 'new'
),
ranked AS (
    SELECT
        id,
        record_id,
        full_name,
        owner,
        normalized_url,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY normalized_url
            ORDER BY created_at ASC
        ) AS occurrence_order,
        -- Get the original record_id for reference
        FIRST_VALUE(record_id) OVER (
            PARTITION BY normalized_url
            ORDER BY created_at ASC
        ) AS original_record_id
    FROM normalized
)
UPDATE crm_records
SET
    status = 'Merger_Pending',
    duplicate_status = 'duplicate',
    normalized_url = ranked.normalized_url
FROM ranked
WHERE crm_records.id = ranked.id
AND ranked.occurrence_order > 1
RETURNING
    crm_records.record_id,
    crm_records.full_name,
    crm_records.status,
    ranked.original_record_id,
    ranked.normalized_url;

INSERT INTO duplicate_merge_log
(record_id, duplicate_of, full_name,
 normalized_url, action, result, message)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.record_id }}',
  '{{ $json.original_record_id }}',
  '{{ $json.full_name }}',
  '{{ $json.normalized_url }}',
  'duplicate_flag',
  'Merger_Pending',
  'Flagged as duplicate of {{ $json.original_record_id }}'
);
